provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, failed vote in an Orryn Drift Parliament — the same spherical chamber but chromatophore colors fractured and chaotic across the assembled Orryn, clashing teal and white-dark alarm pulses and conflicting amber patches, visual disorder representing political disagreement, the facilitator's chromatophores cycling rapidly trying to find consensus that isn't there, tension visible in curled tentacles
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Partial hit — atmosphere and style correct, some species anatomy or concept details missed.
